verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Like a light house let us be A beacon to the city To share the news of Jesus Let it spread throughout this land. May our arms be open wide To all who come inside This place of love and mercy for the lost. May all who enter see The Holy Spirit meet their need as the power of revival falls.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is the time, this is the place Where the power of God is moving To heal the sick, to save the lost To bring us to His holy place. This is the day the prophets told Of a people He'll be using To become a light house

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We gather giving praise And worship in His name Then soon the Presence of the Lord is here We stand in awe to see The power of Almighty Reaching into hearts to make them free The blessings that have come Are changing everyone We see the glory of revival fall.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We have prayed and waited He has heard our cry Dying to our ways And we will follow Him at any cost

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We're to be a lighthouse Let us be Your lighthouse
